title: neustanthus phaseoloides
intro: Neustanthus phaseoloides, commonly known as the Mexican tea or False indigo, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The health benefits of Neustanthus phaseoloides include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Neustanthus phaseoloides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
